node.html:
• Engineered a military-grade camera calibration system for boresight alignment, identifying intrinsic and extrinsic parameters using geometric calibration techniques
  • Reduced reprojection error from 0.15px to ~0.05px, improving alignment accuracy by 3x for high-precision optical targeting applications
  • Developed Python-based calibration tooling with OpenCV to automate the camera parameter extraction pipeline, reducing manual calibration time significantly
  • Collaborated with senior engineers to validate calibration outputs against physical measurement benchmarks in real-world scenarios

• Designed and implemented Agentic AI-driven workflows within backend microservices, enabling autonomous multi-step task execution with minimal human intervention
  • Engineered robust safety guardrails and validation layers to protect against prompt injection attacks, achieving a 47% improvement in security posture across tested attack vectors
  • Built and integrated LangChain-based agent chains with memory and tool-use capabilities to power intelligent automation pipelines
  • Contributed to the architecture of a stateful agent orchestration system capable of managing concurrent workflow sessions reliably
